events.name: Economic Crisis
flavor: Banks collapse as markets spiral out of control.
The currency crashes overnight, devastating the economy.
Unemployment skyrockets as industries collapse.
A financial scandal shakes investor confidence to its core.
The central bank prints money desperately as debts mount.
Supply chains snap as the economy enters freefall.

events.name: Famine
flavor: Crop failures leave millions starving.
Food shortages spread across the nation.
A devastating famine grips the country as supplies run dry.
Hunger spreads as food distribution networks collapse.
Aid convoys are ambushed as desperation turns violent.
The harvest fails for the third year running.

events.name: Civil War
flavor: Rebel factions seize control of key cities.
The government struggles to maintain order as civil war erupts.
Armed militias tear the country apart from within.
Brother fights brother as the nation descends into chaos.
The capital burns as factions fight street by street.
A unified nation fractures along ancient fault lines.

events.name: Epidemic
flavor: A deadly disease spreads rapidly through the population.
Hospitals overflow as an epidemic tears through the nation.
A mysterious illness decimates entire communities.
Quarantine zones are established as the outbreak spirals.
Field hospitals spring up as the health system buckles.
The disease jumps borders faster than any response can follow.

events.name: Drought
flavor: Rivers run dry as a historic drought grips the nation.
Crops wither under a relentless sun.
Water rationing is introduced as reservoirs hit record lows.
Years of drought leave farmland barren and unproductive.
Wells dry up across the countryside as the crisis deepens.
The government declares a national emergency as water runs out.

events.name: Coup
flavor: Military generals seize power in a sudden coup.
The government is overthrown in a violent power grab.
A shadowy faction takes control of the capital overnight.
The president is deposed as tanks roll through the streets.
State television goes dark before the announcement is made.
The coup is swift — the old guard never saw it coming.

events.name: Sanctions
flavor: International sanctions cripple the nation's trade.
Exports grind to a halt as sanctions bite hard.
Foreign assets are frozen as sanctions are imposed.
The economy reels under the weight of international pressure.
Shelves empty as imported goods become impossible to source.
Sanctions cut off access to critical technology and finance.

events.name: Natural Disaster
flavor: A massive earthquake levels entire cities.
Catastrophic flooding displaces millions.
A powerful hurricane devastates the coastline.
A volcanic eruption forces mass evacuations.
Mudslides bury entire villages as the disaster unfolds.
The scale of destruction overwhelms emergency services.

events.name: Military Desertion
flavor: Thousands of soldiers abandon their posts overnight.
Morale collapses as desertion spreads through the ranks.
Entire battalions lay down their arms and walk away.
The army crumbles as soldiers flee en masse.
Officers bribe their way out as the military falls apart.
Conscripts vanish into the night, unwilling to fight.

events.name: Economic Boom
flavor: A booming economy lifts millions out of poverty.
Record growth transforms the nation into a regional powerhouse.
Foreign investment floods in as the economy takes off.
A golden era of prosperity reshapes the country.
GDP growth figures shock even the most optimistic economists.
New industries emerge almost overnight as capital flows freely.

events.name: Population Boom
flavor: A baby boom swells the population to record numbers.
Immigration surges as the nation attracts workers from abroad.
Birth rates soar as living conditions improve dramatically.
A demographic explosion reshapes the nation's future.
Cities expand rapidly as the population grows beyond projections.
A generation of new citizens reinvigorates the workforce.

events.name: Military Expansion
flavor: A massive military buildup doubles the size of the armed forces.
Conscription drives swell the ranks of the army.
New weapons programs transform the nation's military might.
Defence spending soars as the military expands rapidly.
The armed forces absorb a third of the national budget.
Recruitment offices run overtime as the army swells.

events.name: Technological Leap
flavor: A breakthrough in weapons technology reshapes the battlefield.
Scientists unlock new technologies that transform the economy.
A technological revolution puts the nation decades ahead.
Innovation drives explosive growth in both industry and defence.
A single invention ripples outward, changing everything.
Rivals scramble to catch up as the tech gap widens rapidly.

events.name: Golden Age
flavor: A golden age of prosperity and power dawns.
History will remember this era as the nation's finest hour.
Art, science and military might flourish in equal measure.
The nation enters an unprecedented period of dominance.
Future generations will speak of this time with reverence.
A perfect alignment of leadership, resources and opportunity.

events.name: Oil Discovery
flavor: Vast oil reserves are discovered, transforming the economy overnight.
Black gold flows as a massive oil field is struck.
An oil boom sends the economy into overdrive.
The discovery of oil reserves catapults the nation to wealth.
Rigs appear on the horizon as petroleum wealth pours in.
A single drilling team's discovery reshapes the nation's fortunes.

events.name: Alliance Bonus
flavor: A powerful alliance bolsters the nation's military strength.
Foreign troops arrive to reinforce the armed forces.
A new military pact brings weapons and training from abroad.
Allied support transforms the nation's defensive capabilities.
Equipment and advisors pour in under the new security agreement.
The partnership signals a new era of coordinated defence.

events.name: Agricultural Revolution
flavor: New farming techniques triple crop yields overnight.
An agricultural revolution ends food insecurity for millions.
Fertile lands are unlocked as irrigation transforms the countryside.
Advances in agriculture fuel both population and economic growth.
Genetically enhanced crops turn barren land into breadbaskets.
The countryside blooms as modern farming takes hold.

events.name: Trade Boom
flavor: New trade routes open up, flooding the economy with wealth.
Exports surge as demand for the nation's goods skyrockets.
A trade agreement unlocks vast new markets abroad.
Merchants grow rich as commerce booms across the nation.
Container ships queue at the ports as trade explodes.
The trade surplus hits a record high for the third month running.

events.name: Military Innovation
flavor: A new generation of weapons gives the army a decisive edge.
Military doctrine is revolutionised by a tactical breakthrough.
Advanced armaments pour off the production lines.
A military genius reshapes the nation's armed forces.
The new battle system renders enemy defences obsolete.
Field commanders adopt radical new tactics with stunning results.

events.name: Hyperinflation
flavor: Prices double every week as hyperinflation devours the economy.
Wheelbarrows of cash cannot buy a loaf of bread.
The currency becomes worthless as the printing presses run non-stop.
Savings accumulated over lifetimes vanish overnight.
Barter replaces money as faith in the currency collapses entirely.
Soldiers desert when their pay can no longer buy food.

events.name: State Bankruptcy
flavor: The government declares bankruptcy as debts become unpayable.
Creditors seize state assets as the nation defaults on its loans.
Public services collapse as the treasury runs dry.
The IMF arrives with conditions that gut public spending.
A generation of borrowing ends in national humiliation.
Soldiers go unpaid for months as the state crumbles financially.

events.name: Debt Crisis
flavor: Sovereign debt spirals beyond any hope of repayment.
Interest payments consume the entire defence budget.
Foreign creditors demand austerity in exchange for relief.
The debt burden chokes every government department.
Bond markets slam shut as confidence evaporates.
A decade of borrowing catches up all at once.

events.name: Revolution
flavor: The people rise up and topple the existing order.
Revolutionaries storm government buildings across the capital.
Years of oppression explode into open revolt.
The old regime burns as a new order fights to be born.
The revolution devours its own as factions turn on each other.
Statues topple and flags change as power changes hands violently.

events.name: Political Scandal
flavor: Leaked documents expose corruption at the highest levels.
The defence minister resigns amid allegations of embezzlement.
A massive bribery scandal implicates the entire cabinet.
Wiretaps reveal the government has been selling state secrets.
The scandal paralyses government for months.
Public trust collapses as the corruption runs deeper than anyone imagined.

events.name: Separatist Movement
flavor: A powerful separatist movement demands independence.
Ethnic tensions boil over into open armed resistance.
A border region declares unilateral independence.
Insurgents in the north refuse to recognise central authority.
The army is stretched thin fighting separatists on multiple fronts.
A centuries-old grievance finally erupts into open conflict.

events.name: Arms Embargo
flavor: An international arms embargo cuts off weapons supplies.
Spare parts for military equipment become impossible to source.
The air force is grounded as embargoed components run out.
The navy rusts in port as sanctions block vital repairs.
Ammunition stockpiles dwindle with no resupply in sight.
Military readiness crumbles as the embargo tightens its grip.

events.name: Military Purge
flavor: The leader purges the officer corps after a suspected conspiracy.
Hundreds of generals are arrested in a single night.
Experienced commanders are replaced by loyal but incompetent officers.
Paranoia grips the military as purges hollow out leadership.
The army's best minds are imprisoned or executed.
Tactical expertise evaporates as the purge consumes the high command.

events.name: Drone Revolution
flavor: Swarms of autonomous drones transform the battlefield overnight.
Cheap, mass-produced drones replace entire armoured divisions.
Enemy armour burns as drone strikes prove devastating.
The air force is reinvented around unmanned combat platforms.
A drone factory works around the clock, churning out thousands.
Traditional defences crumble against the relentless drone swarms.

events.name: Mercenary Surge
flavor: Mercenary contractors flood in, bolstering the armed forces.
Private military companies arrive with heavy weapons and experience.
Hired guns fill gaps left by overstretched regular forces.
The treasury bleeds cash but the army's strength soars.
Foreign fighters motivated purely by money prove brutally effective.
Mercenary units spearhead an offensive with ruthless efficiency.

events.name: Pandemic Resurgence
flavor: A new viral strain tears through the unvaccinated population.
Field hospitals collapse under the weight of a renewed pandemic.
Entire military units are quarantined as the disease spreads.
Supply chains shatter again as workers fall ill by the millions.
The virus mutates faster than any vaccine can follow.
Lockdowns return as the death toll climbs past anything before.

events.name: Nuclear Accident
flavor: A reactor meltdown contaminates vast swathes of territory.
The exclusion zone swallows entire cities as radiation spreads.
A nuclear accident poisons the water supply for a generation.
Evacuation orders cover half the nation as fallout drifts inland.
The clean-up will take centuries — the damage is done in minutes.
Scientists warn the full death toll may never be known.

events.name: Volcanic Winter
flavor: A supervolcano erupts, blotting out the sun for months.
Ash clouds plunge the region into a freezing artificial winter.
Harvests fail across the continent as temperatures plummet.
The sky turns grey and stays that way for over a year.
Crop failures cascade globally as the volcanic winter bites.
Nations scramble for food reserves as sunlight disappears.

events.name: Locust Plague
flavor: Billion-strong locust swarms devour every crop in their path.
The sky darkens as a locust plague of historic scale descends.
Fields that fed millions are stripped bare within hours.
Pesticides prove useless against the sheer scale of the infestation.
The plague spreads faster than any government response can manage.
A biblical swarm leaves nothing but scorched earth behind.

events.name: Major Earthquake
flavor: A magnitude-8 earthquake levels the industrial heartland.
The capital lies in ruins after a catastrophic seismic event.
Thousands of aftershocks prevent rescue teams from working.
Infrastructure collapses as the ground tears itself apart.
A city that took decades to build is destroyed in ninety seconds.
The earthquake triggers landslides that bury entire valleys.

events.name: Tsunami
flavor: A wall of water destroys the entire coastline in minutes.
Coastal cities vanish beneath the waves of a massive tsunami.
The tsunami strikes with no warning, catching millions off guard.
Naval bases and port facilities are obliterated by the surge.
The sea recedes ominously before the wave arrives.
Survivors cling to debris as entire neighbourhoods are swept away.

events.name: Wildfire Season
flavor: Uncontrollable wildfires rage across millions of hectares.
Entire forests burn as fire crews are overwhelmed.
Smoke blankets major cities as the fire season turns catastrophic.
Military units are diverted to fight fires instead of enemies.
The fires jump firebreaks and devour everything in their path.
A summer of record heat turns the countryside into a tinderbox.

events.name: Water Crisis
flavor: Aquifers run dry as the water crisis reaches catastrophic levels.
Riots break out over access to clean drinking water.
Industry grinds to a halt as water shortages bite.
The military is deployed to guard the last functioning reservoirs.
Cities compete desperately for dwindling river flows.
A generation of mismanagement finally drains the nation dry.

events.name: Brain Drain
flavor: The nation's best minds flee abroad in a devastating brain drain.
Scientists, engineers and doctors emigrate in their thousands.
Universities empty as graduates seek opportunities elsewhere.
Critical expertise drains away as the skilled leave and don't return.
The brain drain accelerates as conditions deteriorate further.
A generation of talent is lost to richer and more stable nations.

events.name: Immigration Wave
flavor: A massive wave of immigrants swells the workforce.
Skilled workers arrive from across the world, energising the economy.
The population surges as refugees and migrants are integrated.
New arrivals fill gaps in the military and labour market.
A generation of immigrants reshapes the nation's culture and economy.
The country becomes a destination for the world's displaced and ambitious.

events.name: Social Unrest
flavor: Mass protests cripple the capital as social unrest explodes.
Strikes spread across every major industry simultaneously.
Riot police struggle to contain the growing wave of unrest.
A general strike shuts down the economy for weeks.
The government declares a state of emergency as protests turn violent.
Decades of inequality detonate in a summer of rage.

events.name: Cyber Attack
flavor: A devastating cyber attack cripples military command systems.
Hackers penetrate every layer of national defence infrastructure.
Power grids go dark as a coordinated cyber offensive strikes.
State secrets are stolen in a breach of unprecedented scale.
Weapons systems malfunction as hostile code does its work.
The digital battlefield proves as decisive as any physical front.

events.name: Rare Earth Discovery
flavor: Vast rare earth deposits are discovered, unlocking new industrial power.
The minerals that build modern weapons are found in abundance.
Mining the rare earth find transforms the defence industry overnight.
Nations scramble to forge deals as the discovery reshapes geopolitics.
The find puts the nation at the centre of global supply chains.
A geological survey reveals reserves worth trillions.

events.name: Mining Boom
flavor: New mineral strikes fuel a massive economic boom.
Mining towns spring up overnight as extraction surges.
Metal exports transform the trade balance in a single quarter.
The ground beneath the nation proves worth more than imagined.
A gold rush mentality grips the population as wealth pours out.
Investors pour in as mining rights sell for record sums.

events.name: Tech Sector Boom
flavor: A technology sector explosion mints millionaires by the thousand.
Startups disrupt every industry as the tech boom accelerates.
Foreign talent floods in as the tech hub reputation spreads globally.
Military applications of new tech give the armed forces a sharp edge.
The nation becomes a magnet for innovation and capital.
A cluster of breakthrough companies puts the nation on the map.

events.name: AI Revolution
flavor: Artificial intelligence transforms every aspect of the economy and military.
AI-driven logistics make the armed forces dramatically more effective.
Autonomous systems handle tasks that once required thousands of personnel.
The AI advantage widens the gap between this nation and all rivals.
Weapons powered by AI prove ruthlessly precise on the battlefield.
A single breakthrough in machine intelligence changes everything.

events.name: Green Energy Revolution
flavor: Cheap renewable energy unleashes a new era of industrial growth.
Energy independence transforms the nation's strategic position.
Solar and wind farms replace fossil fuels at stunning speed.
The energy revolution slashes costs across every sector of the economy.
Military logistics improve dramatically as fuel dependency drops.
The green transition turns an energy importer into an exporter.

events.name: Medical Breakthrough
flavor: A cure for a widespread disease adds millions to the workforce.
Life expectancy jumps as a revolutionary treatment rolls out.
A medical breakthrough reduces battlefield casualties dramatically.
The population booms as infant mortality plummets.
Scientists announce a discovery that will save a billion lives.
Field medicine advances keep soldiers fighting who would once have died.

events.name: Space Program
flavor: A successful space launch demonstrates technological supremacy.
Military satellites give the armed forces unmatched battlefield awareness.
The space program drives innovation across every sector of the economy.
Orbital assets transform communications and weapons guidance systems.
The launch is watched by billions — a statement of power to the world.
Space-based weapons put the nation above its rivals, literally.

events.name: Refugee Crisis
flavor: Millions of refugees flood across the border, straining every resource.
Refugee camps swell beyond capacity as the crisis deepens.
The humanitarian burden tests the nation's infrastructure to its limits.
Border forces are overwhelmed as the flow of displaced people accelerates.
The refugee influx adds both strain and unexpected workforce growth.
A tidal wave of humanity reshapes the demographic landscape overnight.

events.name: Criminal Syndicate
flavor: A powerful criminal syndicate infiltrates the government and military.
Organised crime extracts a massive unofficial tax from the economy.
Drug cartels effectively control entire provinces.
Corruption spreads as criminal money buys politicians and generals.
The state loses the monopoly on violence to organised crime.
Assassinations of officials become a weekly occurrence.

events.name: Piracy Surge
flavor: Pirates seize control of vital trade routes, choking exports.
Shipping insurance costs soar as piracy makes sea lanes dangerous.
Naval patrols are insufficient to stop the wave of maritime crime.
Cargo ships are boarded and ransomed with near impunity.
Trade collapses as merchants refuse to risk the pirate-infested waters.
The navy is humiliated as bold piracy attacks go unpunished.

events.name: Bioweapon Scare
flavor: A suspected bioweapon release triggers mass panic and quarantine.
Military units are quarantined after exposure to an unknown pathogen.
Authorities scramble to contain what may be a biological attack.
The origin of the outbreak remains disputed — and terrifying.
Fear spreads faster than the pathogen as rumours fill the void.
The bioweapon scare paralyses the nation for months.

events.name: Religious Conflict
flavor: Sectarian violence tears apart cities that once lived in peace.
Religious extremists launch attacks on government and military targets.
Ancient theological divisions explode into open warfare.
Militias armed by rival faiths battle for control of sacred sites.
The army fractures along religious lines as the conflict deepens.
A single spark of religious outrage ignites nationwide violence.

events.name: Diplomatic Breakthrough
flavor: A landmark diplomatic agreement opens new economic opportunities.
Peace talks succeed where decades of tension had failed.
A treaty unlocks trade and military cooperation with major partners.
The historic handshake ends a rivalry that once seemed permanent.
Diplomatic victory delivers gains no army could have won.
New embassies open as relations are established with former enemies.

events.name: Ceasefire Dividend
flavor: A ceasefire allows resources to be redirected from war to growth.
The end of fighting lets industry and agriculture recover.
Soldiers return home as a fragile peace holds.
The peace dividend unlocks investment that war had made impossible.
A generation that knew only conflict begins to rebuild.
The guns fall silent — for now — and recovery begins.
